Academic / Administrative Study Scholarship Student Applications Have Started!

Dear Students,

Applications for Academic / Administrative Study Scholarship Students have started. You can apply from the link below.

Application Link

Students who are actively working in a unit and want to continue working are also required to apply.

We wish you success!
